memories.content: Waves 1-10 CRUD (2026-01-14). Market Data Pipeline 253K records (2026-02-05). ReportSettings + Zod (2026-02-07). Sales Analysis Dashboard (2026-02-10). Construction Pipeline (2026-02-11). UW Model Grouping Pipeline Phase 3-4 (2026-03-03). Activity logging, Docker, Tech Debt (2026-02-12). Extraction Hardening + Accessibility (2026-03-03). Login Flow + Auth Guards (2026-03-03). Local OneDrive Extraction (2026-03-03). Deals Page Overhaul: kanban, aerial maps, activity feed, SharePoint (2026-03-04). Deals v5: Returns fix, Compare Deals, shadcn CSS (2026-03-04). Group Pipeline Frontend, Vite optimization, page reviews (2026-03-05). Cap Rate TC T3 extraction re-run + 49 regression tests (2026-03-05). Extraction audit: 7 issues fixed (2026-03-05). UW Model Grouping Expansion (2026-03-06): 9 deferred Proforma groups promoted, 66 files extracted, 2970 values, 0 failures. FileFilter bypass (validate=False), 10 new regression tests, mock **kw fixes in phase3/4/5 tests. Phase D: 9 property collisions all complementary (no conflicts), 5 [Deal Name] placeholders, frontend PASS. Phase E: 10 tests added (365 extraction tests total). Phase F: code review clean (9 advisory concerns, 0 blockers). Tests: 1694+ backend + 721 frontend.

conda env: dashboard-backend. Backend port 8000, Frontend port 5173. Dev command: npm run dev:all. Git: stash apply over pop, don't push unless asked. NO mock/fake data — show errors instead. User: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!! / admin. Thorough validation — test ALL files. User expects Agent Team approach from docs/agent-team-reference.md to be followed for multi-phase work. Review each page in depth before deployment. Security audit deferred. MEMORY.md auto-restores context. Data observations (items 8-12) are NOT issues per user. Terminal mode: tmux.

pydantic-settings 2.x: CORS_ORIGINS JSON array. Single .env in root, symlinked. DB: PostgreSQL localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data (use ->>'key' for JSON, NOT json_extract). SQLite in tests: no server_default, datetime.now(UTC), StaticPool. Pre-commit: ruff, ruff-format, mypy. Auth: OAuth2PasswordRequestForm x-www-form-urlencoded 'username'. passlib: wrap verify_password in try/except. Auth pattern: require_analyst (GET), require_manager (mutations). Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). TWO API CLIENTS: src/lib/api.ts (axios) + src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch), both attach Bearer. shadcn needs CSS vars in :root + tailwind mappings. KPICard: trend && trend > 0 is falsy for 0, use !== undefined && !== 0. ESLint: NO component definitions inside render. Mock extract_from_file with **kw to accept validate kwarg.

LOCAL_DEALS_ROOT=/mnt/c/Users/MattBorgeson/OneDrive - B&R Capital/B&R Capital - Real Estate/Deals. STAGE_FOLDER_MAP maps 6 folders to DealStage. ~1,169 cell mappings from production reference file. 6 supplemental overrides: GOING_IN_CAP_RATE (F26), T3_RETURN_ON_COST (G27), UNLEVERED/LEVERED IRR+MOIC (E39-E44). PROFORMA EXPANSION: 9 groups (66 files), 2 sub-families (Base 13 sheets, Extended 15 sheets) with identical cell layouts. 45 Proforma cell mappings in promote_proforma_groups.py (Property + Proforma sheets). FileFilter 'proforma' exclude pattern bypassed via validate=False in run_group_extraction. Code review note: run_group_extraction does NOT call sync_extracted_to_properties (pre-existing design). Agent Teams 39-47 in docs/agent-team-reference.md.

GROUPING EXPANSION: Phases A-F complete. Awaiting Team 47b (full test suite) and 47c (production readiness) results — expected PASS. 2 excluded groups (4 files) still uninvestigated. FUTURE: Production hosting (Oracle Cloud Free Tier or Hetzner CX22, Docker ready). Mobile iOS. Security audit. Proforma-specific time-horizon fields (IRR_YR2/3/7, MOIC_YR2/3/7) extracted but not displayed in frontend (feature gap, not bug).
